items.name: DarkAge Ninjas: Combat Potion
items.description:
The DarkAge Ninjas are masters of hand to hand combat that none but the fiercest of warriors can handle. 

Drink this potion to increase your vitality to two fold, and to learn to spin kick, flash kick and charge kick in the face, decimating anyone who tries to fight you.
